column1: I was lying on the beach listening to (relax) music.
I will be a bit busy tomorrow. I ... take my dog to the vet.
She (not to open) the box until 12 o’clock.
She (to have) a music lesson at 3 o’clock tomorrow
I (to snowboard) in Switzerland at this moment next month.
... I ... (to finish) writing this book by next month?
... they ... (to leave) their jobs by that time next year?
I (not to read) that book by next week.
